current_sprint.name: MVP Hardening → Pilot Prep
current_sprint.notes: Phase 1/2 (PRs #23/#25) + CT rebuild (PR #26) + Docker infra unpark (PRs #30-#37) + dev/prod split (PRs #27/#29) all shipped. All four 2026-04-16 handoff priorities closed 2026-04-17: Valdí helper-hash enforcement (M38), env-passthrough regression test (M39), cert-change dry run (M40), dev-smoke verified green. Valdí helper-hash gap closed: declaration + runtime enforcement for 3 helpers (extract_rest_api_plugins, parse_nmap_xml, query_crt_sh_single). 981 unit tests passing, coverage 70.26% (floor 65). Pi5 on SHA 4d55d0a: 10 containers healthy, file-backed secrets live, GHCR publish + registry-backed rollback verified. Cert-change dry run surfaced two production bugs (ct_monitor race, init_db migration gap) — filed for separate PRs.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Consent-Gated Pipeline
completed_sprints.notes: Results API, consent, Layer 2 scanners, interpreter, composer, client memory, digital twin. 500 tests.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 4 — Pilot Prep
completed_sprints.notes: Client SQLite DB, Telegram delivery, tier-aware interpreter, provenance split, operator console, scheduler daemon, console API+WS, Redis log streaming, Nmap, prospect lifecycle, interpretation cache.

completed_sprints.name: MVP Hardening Phase 1/2
completed_sprints.notes: PRs #23/#25. CI pipeline, 8 production bug fixes, delivery retry, SQLite integrity check, Docker health checks, cron Telegram alerting, atomic WAL-safe backup, HTTP Basic Auth, scanner decomposition, core extraction, Pydantic validation, coverage floor, golden-path smoke test.

milestones.name: Client onboarding — first 5 Vejle businesses
milestones.notes: Soft-blocked by SIRI approval (pilot launch gates). Code is ready. No onboarding workflow yet; need telegram_chat_id registration per client.

milestones.name: Finding Interpreter wired to live pipeline
milestones.notes: Interpreter wire exists in src/delivery/runner.py:266 (interpret_brief on every client-scan-complete). Operational proof shipped 2026-04-18: scripts/dev/interpret_dry_run.py (observe + send-to-operator modes with CI cost guard) + heimdall-verify-secrets Pi5 alias. Send-mode dry run green on dev stack 2026-04-18 — 12s wall-clock, real Claude API call, delivery_log row written. Observe mode proves runner reachability zero-cost.

milestones.name: CT monitoring rebuild (Sentinel tier)
milestones.notes: PR #26. ct-collector deleted (CertStream upstream dead). crt.sh SAN extraction merged into prospecting. Sentinel-tier daily CertSpotter polling (07:00 UTC), new_cert/new_san/ca_change events on Redis, Telegram delivery wired. $0 recurring cost. src/client_memory/ct_monitor.py.

milestones.name: MVP Hardening Phase 1/2
milestones.notes: PRs #23 #25. CI, 8 bug fixes, scanner decomposed (18 modules), src/core/, Pydantic validation, 65% coverage floor, microSD backup, 7 enforcement hooks, Valdí tokens regenerated.

milestones.name: Dev/prod environment split + Docker infra unpark
milestones.notes: PRs #27 #29 #30 #31 #32 #33 #34 #35 #36 #37. Pi5=PROD / Mac=DEV hard split via sibling docker-compose.dev.yml. External volumes + log rotation, multi-stage Dockerfiles, SHA-tagged images, file-backed secrets, infra/docker→infra/compose rename, GHCR publish + registry-backed rollback. Root Makefile (17 targets). prod branch with pre-push hook. Dev bot @HeimdallSecurityDEVbot confirmed live 2026-04-17 — make dev-smoke green end-to-end.

milestones.name: Valdí helper-hash gap closed (declaration + enforcement)
milestones.notes: query_crt_sh_single now tracked. _validate_helper_hash extracted in registry.py, fails-closed on 6 unsafe branches (missing helper_function, non-colocated, non-callable, lambda, unsourceable, hash mismatch). 3 of 14 approvals now carry enforceable helper_hash (up from 0). 8 new regression tests in TestHelperHashEnforcement. Architect-reviewed APPROVE-WITH-CHANGES, all changes folded in.

milestones.name: Compose env-passthrough regression test
milestones.notes: Extended make dev-ops-smoke with 4 new check blocks: backup.sh regression guard for bug 2489905 (project-name coupling), dev-project container resolution (>=5), /run/secrets populated across 10 (service, secret) pairs, no env-var fallback for the 5 file-backed credentials. Total wall time <15s.

milestones.name: Cert-change alert dry run (synthetic target)
milestones.notes: scripts/dev/cert_change_dry_run.py + config/ct_dry_run.json + make dev-cert-dry-run. Exercises publisher + subscriber + composer end-to-end against heimdall.dk via CertSpotter. No Telegram send (telegram_chat_id=NULL). Architect APPROVE-WITH-CHANGES — single Python driver (no bash shim), no response cache, one wait. Surfaced TWO production bugs (filed as unresolved): ct_monitor commit-before-publish race + init_db not applying migrations. Wall-clock ~10s per run. Working tree uncommitted pending feature branch + PR covering all 2026-04-17 work.

external_deadlines.name: Lawyer consultation — outreach legal questions
external_deadlines.notes: Intro call with David van Boen (Plesner) on 2026-04-14 followed by email containing the full briefing (14 questions) and two attachments: sample-security-notification.md (first-contact message, two variants) and scanning-authorization-template.md (customer consent document). Briefing includes a new Q14 on NIS2/CRA applicability and cites LOV 434/2025 + CRA Article 14 (2026-09-11). Awaiting written response.

external_deadlines.name: Startup Denmark (SIRI) application
external_deadlines.notes: Application drafted. Video pitch script unwritten (mandatory). SIRI approval gates CVR registration, which gates pilot onboarding.

pipeline_run.notes: Provenance-aware stats report in docs/analysis/pipeline-analysis-2026-04-05.md. SIRI-ready market evidence.

blockers.description: SIRI approval gates CVR registration → gates pilot onboarding
blockers.notes: Not a code blocker. Application drafted, video pitch script still unwritten.

blockers.description: Outreach channel viability unconfirmed — awaiting Plesner response to legal briefing
blockers.notes: Briefing sent to David van Boen (Plesner) on 2026-04-14 with 14 questions + 2 attachments. Does not block technical work. Blocks finalisation of outreach campaign copy and channel selection.

follow_ups: Non-WordPress passive detection (SPF/DKIM/DMARC, cookie security, JS library versions)
Threat feed integration: abuse.ch URLhaus + WHOIS domain age
Retire src/client_memory/ JSON module once all consumers migrated
